title: Super Mario World
platform_style_description: SNES aesthetic, rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and readable 16-bit atmosphere
main_subject: a small agile explorer in side view
environment: a bright side-scrolling course with rounded grassy hills, chunky ledges, and a clear path of platforms rising upward
action_mood_cue: caught in a clean forward leap from one ledge to the next
composition: single explorer only, side-view read, one jump arc, rounded hill backdrop, and no crowd or decorative clutter
memory_hook: clean jump rhythm, rounded hills, and cheerful forward platform momentum
legal_watchouts: avoid exact pipe or block layouts
legal_notes: Risk level: high. Use generic archetypes, avoid franchise-identifiable costume or symbol language, and preserve recognizability through atmosphere, scene memory, and gameplay cues only.
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Platformer game.

A small agile explorer in side view in a bright side-scrolling course with rounded grassy hills, chunky ledges, and a clear path of platforms rising upward, caught in a clean forward leap from one ledge to the next.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- SNES aesthetic, rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and readable 16-bit atmosphere
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- bright, playful, nimble

Composition:
- single explorer only, side-view read, one jump arc, rounded hill backdrop, and no crowd or decorative clutter
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Mario likeness, avoid mustache and cap codes, avoid official enemy silhouettes, avoid exact pipe or block layouts, avoid resemblance to mario

generation_notes.preferred_render_mode: illustrative pixel art or stylized retro render
generation_notes.detail_policy: rich enough to feel desirable, simple enough to read fast
